rationale: Ongoing Russian strikes on Kyiv and continued oil price decline are both continuations of established trends with no new qualitative impact on Romanian daily life. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline offers mild relief on energy costs for Romanian households, but this is an ongoing trend with no new development this cycle.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Continued Russian strikes on Ukraine remain a background security concern for Romania given Black Sea proximity, but no escalation affecting Romanian territory is reported.

top_events.title: G7 meeting in France: agenda and protests
top_events.summary: G7 discussions on global economic and security issues may indirectly shape EU policy relevant to Romania, but no concrete decisions affecting Romanian life have been confirmed.
